pr-evidence/document-static-chunk-id/pr-.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5/high review initially found a positional constructor ABI regression. Fixed by moving static_chunk_id after task_prefix_id and adding a positional compatibility regression test; re-review approved with no blockers.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_planner_materializer.py tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q (106 passed)
what_changed: Added DEFAULT_STATIC_CHUNK_ID and DocumentKVRequest.static_chunk_id for caller-owned document static context chunk names.
Updated CachePlanner to honor custom static_chunk_id for DocumentKVRequest while preserving legacy RestaurantKVRequest static chunk behavior.
Extended SourceDocument.from_texts(...) and README examples to use caller-owned static chunk ids.
Exported the static chunk default through document and legacy facades and added compatibility tests.
pr-evidence/document-static-chunk-id/pr-.why: Removes a hardcoded static chunk name from document planning so Cachet can support arbitrary textual document schemas without breaking existing callers.
